monetization.mid_roll_placement: Place mid-roll ad break at the START of Scene 3 (main content). Viewers are already invested — highest-retention placement.
monetization.min_video_length: Keep videos 8+ minutes to unlock mid-roll ads — adds 40–60% more revenue per video.
monetization.membership_cta: Ee channel support pannanum na — membership link description la irukku. Nandri.
monetization.affiliate_cta: Naangal use pannuravai ella links description la irukku.
monetization.affiliate_disclosure: Affiliate Disclosure: Some links below may earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.
monetization.sponsor_slot: Scene 2 opening — 45 to 60 seconds max. Keep it conversational, not a hard ad read.
monetization.sponsor_script_template: Today's video is supported by [Brand]. [One sentence what they do]. I have been using it for [time] and here is my honest take — [genuine opinion]. Link in description.
monetization.super_thanks_prompt: Say at emotional moments: 'If this helped you, Super Thanks means a lot to us.'
revenue_streams: AdSense — enable before upload, keep videos 8+ min to unlock mid-roll ad breaks
YouTube Shorts — extract hook scene, post same day, drives free subscriber growth
Channel Membership — enable at 500 subs, offer behind-the-scenes / early access perks
Super Thanks — enabled with monetization, mention after emotional or useful moments
Affiliate Links — Amazon/Flipkart/tools you actually use, add to every description
Brand Sponsorships — start pitching at 1,000 subs, target lifestyle + tech brands
Digital Products — Gumroad templates at 5,000 subs (resume, finance tracker, notion)
YouTube Community Posts — poll, tease, engage between uploads for free organic reach
monetization.shorts_strategy: Post a Short from this video on the SAME DAY. Extract the hook scene (first 30 sec). Add auto-captions. Upload as a separate Short with a hook title. Best days: Wednesday and Saturday.
monetization.community_post_timing: Post a teaser on YouTube Community tab 1–2 days BEFORE uploading. Use a poll or question about the topic.

growth_tips: Best upload days for this channel: Wednesday and Saturday. Post at 7–9pm local time.
Reply to every comment within the first hour — algorithm rewards early engagement.
Pin a question as your first comment immediately after uploading.
Post title in Tamil first — appears in regional Tamil search.
Extract the most emotional 30-second moment for Tamil Shorts.
Add timestamps to description — tech viewers skip to what they need.
Share in Telugu/Tamil tech WhatsApp or Telegram groups relevant to Tamil-speaking viewers in Tamil Nadu, Sri Lanka, and worldwide.
End-screen: suggest one older video that complements this topic.
safety_rules: Never make specific financial predictions or guarantees.
Never show or play copyrighted music without license — use YouTube Audio Library.
Never use other creators' footage without permission — create your own B-roll.
Never make medical claims — share personal experience only.
Never name specific individuals negatively — share situations, not people.
Label opinions clearly as opinions — not facts.
Avoid sensational titles that your video cannot deliver on.
For geopolitical topics: share your personal response, not political analysis.
